description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/fredriklarsen/airbrush/android:2.0.0 with an empty entrypoint and defines a cache keyed by ${CI_PROJECT_ID} storing gradle-cache/wrapper and gradle-cache/caches/modules-2/files-2.1. Add a global before_script that echoes a start message, sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the workspace gradle-cache, makes ./gradlew executable, appends "org.gradle.daemon=false" to gradle.properties, decodes the $KEYSTORE and $SIGNING_KEY_RING_FILE base64 secrets into android.keystore and secretRingKey.gpg, exports SIGNING_SECRET_KEY_RING_FILE and KEYSTORE_FILE to those paths, and echoes a finish message. Define three stages: verify, build, and deploy. In the verify stage add a tests job that runs "./gradlew clean lintRelease testRelease" and publishes JUnit XML reports from */build/test-results/*/TEST-*.xml as artifacts. In the build stage add a library job that runs "./gradlew assembleRelease", stores the generated AAR files from library/build/outputs/aar/* as artifacts, and runs only on tag refs; also add a sample-app job that runs "./gradlew sample:assembleDebug", stores the debug APKs from sample/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk as artifacts, and runs only on tag refs. In the deploy stage add a publish job that runs "./gradlew publishReleasePublicationToSonatypeRepository", is manual, and runs only on tag refs.
